## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Vendr and GrowthX Labs to finalize agreement details and scope for a content strategy engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vendr is hesitant to commit to the initial $250k/year proposal without first seeing results](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Agreement reached on starting at $12k/month for 6 months, with potential to increase based on strategy sprint outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs emphasizes the importance of balancing programmatic and editorial content for best results](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Strategy sprint kickoff tentatively scheduled for September 2nd or 8th, 2023](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Topics

### Contract Negotiations

  - [Vendr requests approval rights for use of their name/logo in marketing materials](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Auto-renewal clause to be removed as per Vendr's policy](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs agrees to add a termination clause for breach](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Total engagement scope reduced from $250k/year to $12k/month for 6 months initially](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [GrowthX Labs highlights the need to refresh Vendr's 2,400 existing pages, many of which are losing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining high-quality content and refreshing stale pages](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Recommendation to improve cross-linking in blog content for better semantic relationships and user navigation](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Balance between programmatic content generation and editorial work discussed as crucial for SEO success](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Strategy Sprint Details

  - [Output will include clear metrics on shrinking/stale content areas and growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Will demonstrate the value of both programmatic and editorial content approaches](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Allows Vendr to see potential results before committing to a larger engagement](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Procurement Process Discussion

  - [Marcel (GrowthX Labs) expresses frustration with lengthy procurement processes for SaaS tools](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Matt (Vendr) acknowledges the challenges of pricing and selling lower-cost SaaS products due to time-consuming procurement](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Potential opportunity identified for Vendr to offer sell-side procurement assistance services](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to send legal feedback on the agreement to GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to update the statement of work with $12k/month pricing and remove auto-renewal clause](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Finalize strategy sprint start date (September 2nd or 8th, 2023)](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Matt to present updated agreement to Vendr's finance team for approval](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to begin preparation work for the strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/jjFrCjsuJag4otSe8xGnwsDCGL88rx2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
